name: pi-custom-system-prompt
description_en: Pi extension that loads a custom system prompt from `~/.pi/agent/system-prompts/*.md` and injects it on every agent turn, with commands to select, toggle, reload, and switch between replace and append modes.
description_zh: Pi 扩展，从 `~/.pi/agent/system-prompts/*.md` 加载自定义系统提示，并在每个代理轮次中注入，带有选择、切换、重载以及在替换和追加模式之间切换的命令
